attributes.additional_details: I want the Government to put rules in place that listens to it's own Government. I have a disability called VCFS which may be better known as Di George syndrome. I want to raise awareness against fake news with those who have a disability. Those who have a disability & are seeing these news articles are being heavily impacted. For those with Di George Syndrome we see the world straight as it is. If you through in anything else then it's a problem for us.
attributes.background: I want the Government to put rules in place that listens to it's own Government. I have a disability called VCFS which may be better known as Di George syndrome. I want to raise awareness against fake news with those who have a disability.

rejection.details:
We find it unclear what you are asking the Government to do.

This petition may be asking for something similar to what you seem to be asking for. If so, you may wish to sign it:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/743790
